description: Biyejit Customized Leather Long Wallet Travel Purse Credit Card Holder Phone Clutch - Large Capacity Zip Around -Easy access: Long zip around style is designed for you to keep your cash flat and easy access to the cards you need. Use a damp cloth to wipe down. Do not soak with water Note:Little leather smell is normal, put it outside for few days, the smell will disappear
